tasks.subject: Task 1: Design tokens and Tailwind craft config
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Add Space Grotesk, craft CSS vars, and Tailwind colour/shadow extensions.

**Files:**
- Modify: `src/styles/globals.css`
- Modify: `tailwind.config.js`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] `npm run build` passes
- [ ] `bg-parchment`, `text-forest`, `text-forest-light`, `text-bark`, `shadow-craft` are valid Tailwind classes
- [ ] `.tile`, `.tile-forest`, `.tile-hover`, `.craft-label`, `.animate-craft-fade-in` exist in globals.css

**Verify:** `npm run build` → `✓ built in`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/styles/globals.css", "tailwind.config.js"], "verifyCommand": "npm run build", "acceptanceCriteria": ["npm run build passes", "bg-parchment text-forest shadow-craft are valid Tailwind classes", ".tile .tile-forest .craft-label classes exist in globals.css"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: Responsive Navigation and App layout
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Navigation renders as bottom bar on mobile, top bar (forest bg) on desktop; App.tsx reorders flex layout.

**Files:**
- Modify: `src/components/layout/Navigation.tsx`
- Modify: `src/App.tsx`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] Mobile: bottom nav bar, parchment bg, forest border-top, active dot indicator
- [ ] Desktop: top nav bar, forest bg, parchment wordmark, forest-light active links
- [ ] `npm run build` passes

**Verify:** `npm run build` → `✓ built in`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/components/layout/Navigation.tsx", "src/App.tsx"], "verifyCommand": "npm run build", "acceptanceCriteria": ["Mobile bottom nav renders with parchment bg", "Desktop top nav renders with forest bg", "Active tab highlighted correctly on both"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: Dashboard shell, hero section, and gamification tiles
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Replace Dashboard wrapper and add hero carbon budget tile + level + streak tiles.

**Files:**
- Modify: `src/components/features/Dashboard.tsx`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] Parchment background, no bg-nature-gradient or particles
- [ ] Hero dark tile: CO₂ number, stacked unit annotation, progress bar, status badge
- [ ] Level tile (light) and Streak tile (dark) in hero grid
- [ ] Activity imported from `../../types/activity`
- [ ] `npm run build` passes

**Verify:** `npm run build` → `✓ built in`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/components/features/Dashboard.tsx"], "verifyCommand": "npm run build", "acceptanceCriteria": ["Parchment background on Dashboard", "Hero tile shows todayProgress with stacked unit annotation", "Level and streak tiles render in hero row"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: Weekly stats row and category breakdown
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Add 3/4-column stat tiles and replace PieChart with horizontal bar breakdown tile.

**Files:**
- Modify: `src/components/features/Dashboard.tsx`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] 3 stat tiles on mobile, 4 on desktop
- [ ] Category breakdown: horizontal bar rows, forest header, muted dot colours
- [ ] Empty state renders when no activities logged
- [ ] `npm run build` passes

**Verify:** `npm run build` → `✓ built in`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/components/features/Dashboard.tsx"], "verifyCommand": "npm run build", "acceptanceCriteria": ["3 stat tiles mobile 4 desktop", "PieChart replaced with bar rows", "Empty state shows correctly"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 5: Weekly trend, Activity Breakdown wrapper, Recent Activities
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Restyle LineChart, wrap ActivityBreakdown, add Recent Activities — completing the Dashboard rewrite.

**Files:**
- Modify: `src/components/features/Dashboard.tsx`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] LineChart in cream tile, forest line, bark axis, styled tooltip
- [ ] ActivityBreakdown wrapped in craft tile with forest header
- [ ] Recent Activities rows with forest header, dividers, footer
- [ ] No Card imports remain
- [ ] `npm run build` passes

**Verify:** `npm run build` → `✓ built in`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/components/features/Dashboard.tsx"], "verifyCommand": "npm run build", "acceptanceCriteria": ["LineChart restyled", "ActivityBreakdown in craft tile", "Recent Activities renders correctly", "No unused Card imports"]}
```
